channel.title: SudoEarth — Writing
channel.description: Notes on calm software, sudoku, and building an app that keeps time with you instead of demanding your time.

item.title: Why I deleted Sudoku.com for SudoEarth
item.author: support@sudoearth.app (Yue Hu)
item.description: On streaks, leaderboards, and the quiet game sudoku used to be — and the version of sudoku I had to build because nobody else would.
